name: Mushroom Spread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Coarsely chopped leeks (white part only)
1 large garlic clove - peeled and finely chopped
3/4 pound Mushrooms - wiped clean and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the leeks and garlic; sauté for 2 minutes, stirring frequently.
3. Add the mushrooms, oregano, salt, and black pepper to the skillet.
4. Reduce the heat slightly and continue cooking, stirring occasionally,
until the mushrooms are cooked through and their liquid has evaporated,
about 5 to 10 minutes.
5. Puree the mixture in a blender or food processor.
6. Stir in the lemon juice and horseradish (or mustard) to taste.
Variation: Before pureeing, this mixture can be used as a filling for turnovers.
If needed, stretch the amount by blending in some mashed tofu
and additional seasonings. Makes 1-1/4 cups.
